who: HR managers in mid-size companies using Gusto for payroll processing 50-100 employees
offer: For HR managers in mid-size companies using Gusto for payroll processing 50-100 employees, inaccurate payroll processing causes employee dissatisfaction. We provide a streamlined payroll management tool instead of manual payroll processing with Gusto.
problem: Inaccurate payroll processing leading to employee dissatisfaction and compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll tools
Direct message 20-50 HR managers with demo video
Participate in forums for HR managers sharing payroll tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard for payroll overview and manual entry for payroll adjustments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
